mapper.select: SELECT c.total, c.platform, c.partner, c.waiting, m.issuedThisMonth, m.usedThisMonth FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN partner_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS platform, SUM(CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partner, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting FROM coupon ) c, ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS issuedThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'USED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS usedThisMonth FROM member_coupon WHERE TO_CHAR(issued_at, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') ) m

SELECT t.couponId, t.partnerId, t.partnerName, t.couponName, t.discountAmount, t.discountType, t.maxDiscountAmount, t.minOrderAmount, t.platformShare, t.partnerShare, t.validFrom, t.validUntil, t.status, t.createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.member_coupon_id = t.couponId) AS issuedCount FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, TO_CHAR(c.valid_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validFrom, TO_CHAR(c.valid_until, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validUntil, c.status, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC ) t WHERE t.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, TO_CHAR(c.valid_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validFrom, TO_CHAR(c.valid_until, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validUntil, c.status, 0 AS issuedCount, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE c.status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, TO_CHAR(c.valid_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validFrom, TO_CHAR(c.valid_until, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validUntil, c.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.member_coupon_id = c.coupon_id) AS issuedCount, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_id, partner_id, coupon_name, discount_amount, discount_type, max_discount_amount, min_order_amount, platform_share, partner_share, valid_from, valid_until, status, created_at ) VALUES ( coupon_seq.NEXTVAL, #{partnerId}, #{couponName}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountType}, #{maxDiscountAmount}, #{minOrderAmount}, #{platformShare}, 100 - #{platformShare}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name = #{req.couponName}, discount_amount = #{req.discountAmount}, discount_type = #{req.discountType}, max_discount_amount = #{req.maxDiscountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, min_order_amount = #{req.minOrderAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, platform_share = #{req.platformShare}, partner_share = 100 - #{req.platformShare}, valid_from = #{req.validFrom}, valid_until = #{req.validUntil} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName FROM partner WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY partner_name
